rationale: The cited paper appears only as part of a grouped methodological citation when the authors justify using an incentive-compatible BDM-style willingness-to-pay elicitation. It is listed alongside other studies as an example that this method has been used in marketing, without any discussion of its incidental-price theory, findings, or specific design details. There is no evidence that the 2004 paper materially shapes the citing paper's conceptual framing, hypotheses, or interpretation.
